title: Is It Thundering?
description: Simply displays a notification on-screen when it is thundering!
body:
This mod does one task and one task only.

Displays "⚡ Thunder Detected ⚡" on-screen whenever it is thundering in-game

You can open `Options` -> `Controls` -> `Keybinds` -> And find the "Is It Thundering?" category and set the keybind there! There is no default key set.
